# ARES data-contract drift report

**Generated:** 2026-06-18
**Schema (contract):** [`app/src/ingest/ares-contract.schema.json`](../app/src/ingest/ares-contract.schema.json) ¬∑
[raw](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/james-beep-boop/Lesson3/main/app/src/ingest/ares-contract.schema.json)
**Corpus reviewed:** `markknit/cbe-generation-system` `upstream/main` @ **`de95c72`** (`generators/data/*_data.js`, 13 files)
**Generated by:** `cd app && npx tsx scripts/contract-drift.ts -- <generators/data dir>`

> Drift is **non-blocking** on our side ‚Äî we still ingest preliminary data; this report is the
> feedback loop to ARES. Once output validates clean we promote the ingest check to a hard gate.

---

## Summary

**0 / 13 files conform ¬∑ 18 total drift issues.**

But **13 of the 18 are the not-yet-adopted `schemaVersion`** field (one per file) ‚Äî expected, since
that's a *new* field we proposed and ARES hasn't added yet. Excluding it, there are only **5
substantive issues left**, all "missing field":

| Issue | Count | Files |
|---|---|---|
| `schemaVersion` missing (proposed new field ‚Äî expected) | 13 | all |
| `UNIT.content` missing | 3 | bio_1_1, bio_1_3, bio_1_4 |
| `META.substrand_id` missing | 1 | bio_1_3 |
| `META.substrand_name` missing | 1 | bio_1_3 |

**Trend:** 55 ‚Üí 43 ‚Üí **18** issues across three passes. The 2026-06-18 upstream fixes
(`7039875`, `2c63fa0`, `ca15610`) resolved the bio_1_4 parse regression (unescaped apostrophes),
the `safetyNotes` corruption (5 files), the stray `UNIT.keyInquiry` (bio_2_1 + math_*), most missing
`META` fields, and the bio_3_1 `summaryTablePrompt.explained` gap. bio_1_4 now parses and generates.

---

## What's left (actionable)

1. **`schemaVersion`** ‚Äî add a top-level `schemaVersion` (e.g. `'1.0.0'`) to each `*_data` file so it
   declares which contract version it conforms to. (This clears 13 of the 18.)
2. **`UNIT.content`** ‚Äî missing in **bio_1_1, bio_1_3, bio_1_4**. The generator renders it as the
   "Sub-Strand Content" overview row, so these three produce a blank content row.
3. **`META.substrand_id` / `META.substrand_name`** ‚Äî missing in **bio_1_3** only.

---
